markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Scala Native

Scala Native is an optimising ahead-of-time compiler for the Scala programming language. Traditionally, a virtual machine, the JVM, was required to run Scala programs. Scala Native taps into the compiler to emit LLVM intermediate representation rather than JVM bytecode. Then, the LLVM compiler infrastructure is used to produce native libraries and executables. Given that Scala Native executables are stand-alone programs, they generally have a shorter start-up time and low memory consumption. This opens up new avenues to deploy Scala programs where previously the virtual machine would be the limiting factor. For example, developers could write programs for the command line or embedded devices.

Tutorials and Examples

  • Giter8 template for a minimal Scala Native projectstars63 - Official Giter8 template for a minimal Scala Native project.
  • Hands on Scala Nativestars26 - Tutorial for implementing a bandwidth monitor with Ncurses.
  • Starter for Scala Nativestars26 - Scala Native project that links to a custom C library.
  • Building C code using sbt-jnistars3 - Example for compiling C code in a Scala Native project using sbt-jnistars86.
  • Example project with external dependenciesstars48 - Example project that uses external dependencies to generate HTML and run a test suite.
  • Starter for Gtk+ Projectsstars1 - Giter8 template for Scala Native GUI projects using Gtk+.
  • Modern systems programming with scala native book.

Build Tools

  • sbt - Scala's standard build tool.
  • Millstars1.6k - Build tool striving for simplicity, inspired by Bazel.
  • Bloopstars741 - Scala build server and command-line tool for fast developer workflows.
  • Seedstars224 - Build tool based on Bloop. Focuses on user experience and cross-platform builds, inspired by Cargostars6.8k.

Functional Programming

  • Shapelessstars3.2k - Library for generic programming.
  • Squantsstars767 - DSL for quantities, units of measure and dimensional analysis.
  • scalazstars4.5k - Type classes and instances for data structures.
  • noboxstars29 - Immutable primitive array wrapper without boxing.
  • PPrintstars134 - Pretty-print values and types.
  • SourceCodestars458 - Implicits providing meta data similar to __LINE__ in C.
  • reactifystars74 - Functional Reactive Programming framework for Scala.
  • chimneystars758 - Boilerplate-free data transformations.
  • Quicklensstars662 - Modify deeply nested case class fields.

Unit Tests

  • µTeststars439 - Library for unit tests.
  • miniteststars174 - Lightweight testing library.
  • scalapropsstars265 - Library for property-based testing.
    • scalaprops-shapelessstars9 - Generation of arbitrary ADT instances.
    • scalaprops-cross-examplestars2 - Cross-platform example.
  • ScalaCheckstars1.7k - Property-based testing for Scala.
  • ScalaTeststars951 - Testing library.
  • specs2stars697 - Software Specifications for Scala.
  • Makeshiftstars1 - Library for unit tests.
  • MUnitstars208 - Scala testing library with actionable errors and extensible APIs.

Bindings

  • cmarkstars11 - Bindings for the cmarkstars1.1k CommonMark parser library.
  • libuvstars8 - Bindings for libuvstars17.4k, a library for asynchronous I/O.
  • SDL2 and OpenGLstars32 - Bindings for the graphical frameworks SDL2 and OpenGL.
  • Cocoastars19 - Bindings for the macOS graphical framework Cocoa.
  • GNU Scientific Librarystars2 - Bindings for GNU Scientific Library (GSL).
  • BLASstars19 - Bindings for BLAS, a library for Linear Algebra.
  • Gtk+stars19 - Bindings for the GTK+ graphical toolkit.
  • libsoupstars2 - Bindings for the libsoup HTTP client/server library.
  • libuistars54 - GUI framework based on libuistars9.9k.
  • GStreamerstars1 - Bindings for the GStreamer multimedia framework.
  • Qtstars8 - Bindings for Qt.

File Formats and Parsers

  • msgpack4zstars3 - Implementation of MessagePack, a binary serialisation format.
  • FastParsestars949 - Library for defining and running parsers.
  • scalatagsstars675 - HTML/XML construction and rendering.
  • Pinestars108 - HTML/XML parsing, manipulation and rendering.
  • scala-jsonstars59 - JSON parser.
  • uJson - fast, flexible and intuitive JSON for Scala
  • toml-scalastars21 - TOMLstars15.3k parser with codec derivation.
  • argonautstars502 - Purely functional JSON parser and library.
  • ScalaPBstars1.1k - Protocol Buffer compiler for Scala.
    • scalapb-argonautstars1 - JSON and Protocol Buffer converters for ScalaPB based on Argonaut.
  • sconfigstars78 - HOCON parser.

Databases

  • JDBCstars7 - Port of the database access layer JDBC to Scala Native.
  • SQLite4Sstars16 - Port of the Java library Sqlite4java. Includes bindings for the SQLite native library.

Web Development

  • Trailstars74 - Routing library.
  • sttpstars1.1k - HTTP Client library.
  • snunitstars46 - Scala Native HTTP server based on NGINX Unit.

Concurrency

  • scala-native-loopstars36 - Event loop and async-oriented IO for Scala Native
  • castorstars90 - Lightweight, typed Actor library for Scala.

Logging

  • scribestars311 - Fast and simple logging library.
  • sloggingstars46 - Typesafe-loggingstars818 and SLF4J-compatible logging library based on macros.

Console

  • fansistars181 - Library for creating ANSI-coloured strings.
  • scoptstars1.3k - Command-line argument parser.
  • scala-optparse-applicativestars12 - Port of Haskell's CLI argument parsing library optparse-applicative.
  • scallopstars594 - A simple Scala CLI parsing library.

Robotics

  • Potassiumstars13 - Framework for writing robot software.
  • WPILibstars5 - Reimplementation of the FIRST Robotics WPILib libraries.

Programs

  • sglgearsstars15 - Port of GL gears.c.
  • k8s-clistars3 - CLI tools to generate Kubernetes resources for Akka, Play Framework and Lagom-based applications.
  • Coursierstars1.8k - Coursier's bootstrap command generates native launchers.
  • fractalsstars6 - A self-similar fractal generator with basic animation support.

Infrastructure

  • Seed Docker image - Docker image for cross-platform builds with Seedstars224.
  • scala-native-sbt-dockerstars4 - Docker image for Scala Native and sbt.
